title: CW Arrowverse Speedsters
description: Add CW Flash and more speedster
body:
Videos: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLEvwwrDqLHUJUOWQP680B4aoUZ9XNhcKI

you can become a Speedster by being struck by lightning

So far adds:

Speedsters Super powers:

Running on wall,
Running on water,
Running through walls,
Running superfast,
throw lightning,
Flash time(stop all the time),
Infinite regeneration 2 strength 1



Suits:

Zoom,
Flash,
Reverse Flash,
Savitar,
Kid Flash,
Godspeed,
JayGarrick

Mechanics:

9 new advancement
The Speedforce,
The Philosopher's Stone

Items:

Velocity 9,
Tachyon

Blocks:
The Suit crafter
